projects.title: Silverstone Museum — On Track
projects.summary: Campaign artwork and an installation concept for Silverstone Museum, recreating the racetrack in Scalextric form.
projects.body: Over a 3 year period while working at Giant, I created various products for Silverstone Museum that helped promote upcoming events and campaigns. I also created concepts and artwork for internal displays, signage and POS. Shown here is my favourite concept for an installation, that recreated the Silverstone racetrack in Scalextric form.

projects.title: Pronto — Coffee & Hot Drinks Rebrand
projects.summary: A redesign for a vending machines and drinks distributor, built around a 'need it now' brand message.
projects.body: A redesign project for a vending machines and drinks distributor that wanted to have more character within the brand. My concept revolved around the “need it now, need it Pronto” message that implies speed and reliability, reinforcing the brand's principles.

projects.title: Brioche Pasquier — Snack Roll Monsters
projects.summary: Five quirky monster characters created to reinvigorate a range of filled brioche snack rolls for school-age kids.
projects.body: French family bakery since 1936, Brioche Pasquier looked to reinvigorate their range of filled brioche snack rolls. My concept was to appeal to the bellies these products end up in (4-12 year old school children) and inject humour and bright colours through the creation of five quirky monsters — including a wearable mascot costume and a 3D render produced for TV advertising.

projects.title: ActivInsights — Brand Concept
projects.summary: A rebrand concept for a clinical trials technology company, developed while at Giant.
projects.body: ActivInsights supports clinical trials with integrated digital health technologies that deliver digital measures from high-quality data. While at Giant, we were tasked with breathing new life into the brand. Although this particular design didn't end up being used, it was a concept I really enjoyed developing.

projects.title: All Things Business — Magazine Redesign
projects.summary: Redesign and ongoing art direction of Giant's monthly business publication, plus its supporting website.
projects.body: During my time working at GIANT, I had a pivotal role in the redesign and upkeep of their monthly publication 'All Things Business'. This included templated pages, creation of promotional material and the design of the website.

projects.title: To Be Continued — Comicon Rebrand
projects.summary: A rebrand of a Bedford-based Comicon, formerly NICE, with a rawer, more expressive aesthetic.
projects.body: To Be Continued is a Bedford based Comicon organised by Close Encounters comic stores. Previously called NICE, I was tasked with rebranding the convention with a more raw aesthetic.

projects.title: Arkle Finance — Website Parallax
projects.summary: A parallax slide deck designed to give Arkle Finance's new homepage striking visual impact.
projects.body: When working on Arkle Finance's new website, I designed a parallax slide deck to give the homepage striking impact.

projects.title: MND Association — Not For Profit Campaign
projects.summary: Three social campaign narratives built from real-life accounts, raising awareness of Motor Neurone's Disease.
projects.body: Motor Neurone's Disease is a complex disease which not only affects the people living with it, but also the friends, family and community around them. I created three separate narratives around this, using real life accounts to show the severity and repercussions of these moving, true stories.

projects.title: EMW — Law Without Limits
projects.summary: Supporting brand elements and creative advertising for Northamptonshire law firm EMW, built around 'Law Without Limits'.
projects.body: Northamptonshire law firm EMW were looking to elevate their current logo through supporting brand elements, tone of voice and creative advertising. I worked around the “Law Without Limits” strapline, using natural obstacles and rough terrain to envision strength and perseverance.

projects.title: Barrus / Wilkinson Sword — Packaging Range
projects.summary: Packaging design across a 25+ product range for Wilkinson Sword garden tools, now stocked in garden centres and Home Sense.
projects.body: Working with Barrus and one additional designer, I was able to present six design options which were then amalgamated and finalised into a coherent design that could then roll out to a range of over 25 products, now sold in various garden centres as well as Home Sense.

projects.title: 4C — QR Code Rebrand
projects.summary: A bold rebrand concept for IT infrastructure consultancy 4C, using a scannable QR code as the logo mark itself.
projects.body: 4C is a UK-based team of IT infrastructure consultants that help organisations from universities and healthcare providers to government, charities and private businesses manage their technology more effectively. My rebrand concept may seem radical — using a QR code as the logo — but it provides instant connectivity no matter where the logo is seen.

projects.title: Wicksteed Park — Halloween Event
projects.summary: Memorable, full-throttle horror creative for Wicksteed Park's Halloween event.
projects.body: Wicksteed Park were looking to do something they had never done before. I was set with the task of making their Halloween event something memorable. I might have gone overboard on the horror aspect, but it definitely had impact.
